svg.text: Linux IIO → ROS 2 Medical Acquisition Stack
Complete open source pipeline · hardware boot → kernel driver → surgical robot
CS · IRQ · clock speed per device
DRDY IRQ → IIO trigger → DMA ring buffer
kernel handles timing · no userspace jitter
No kernel buffer required · good for first bring-up
epoll_wait() → read() → parse binary sample from /dev/iio:deviceN
Auto channel discovery via scan_elements sysfs
Correct approach for continuous EEG / ECG · supports signed/unsigned · endian · shift
Clinical logging · Surgical monitoring · Any ROS 2 node
